field_notes.chunk_pos: ChunkPos primitive fixture accepted by ClientboundForgetLevelChunkPacket without initialized world or chunk storage.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound forget_level_chunk packet framing and dispatch/decode for one ChunkPos fixture only; do not infer chunk unload behavior, client world state, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
